text: I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation as I cross the threshold from the clean emptiness of the corridor into the vivid, concept-rich space dedicated to research and development. The bold letters 'R+D' signal innovation, urging me to reflect not only on technological progress but also on the intricacies of human connection. I sense the quiet hum of thought beneath the surface, an invitation to slow down and contemplate how we create, imagine, and coexist with what we bring into the world.
